# Omotra - Web Development for UK SMBs
# https://omotra.co.uk

## About Omotra
Omotra is a web development agency based in the United Kingdom, specialising in websites and business automation for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Our tagline is "Built well. Looked after."

## Services

### Website Development
- Custom website design and development
- Mobile-first, responsive design
- SEO optimised from day one
- Fast load times and conversion-focused layouts
- Starting from £3,500

### Business Systems & Automation
- CRM setup and integration
- Online booking systems
- Payment processing integration
- Email automation
- Customer portals
- Data sync between tools
- Starting from £2,500

### Ongoing Support
- Monthly security updates
- 24/7 uptime monitoring
- Regular backups
- Content changes included
- Performance optimisation
- Priority support
- Starting from £99/month

## Process
1. Discovery (1 week) - Business goals review, systems audit, competitor analysis
2. Proposal (2-3 days) - Fixed price quote with timeline and milestones
3. Design (1-2 weeks) - Wireframes, mockups, 2 rounds of revisions
4. Build (2-3 weeks) - Development with weekly progress updates
5. Launch (1-2 days) - Final review, DNS setup, SSL, analytics
6. Support (Ongoing) - Documentation, training, warranty, support

## Target Clients
- UK small and medium businesses (1-50 employees)
- Hospitality and outdoor activities sectors
- Professional services, retail, and e-commerce
- Business owners who value quality and want a technology partner

## Contact
- Email: build@omotra.co.uk
- Response time: Within 24 hours (1 business day)
- Location: United Kingdom

## Portfolio Highlights
- Halcourt Search: Recruitment website with candidate portal (3x increase in applications)
- Packed Experiences: Trip booking site (10% improvement in sales)
- Apex Expeditions Ltd: Full booking platform with payments
- Freelancer Manager: SaaS platform for contractor management

## Pricing Summary
- Websites: From £3,500
- Business Systems: From £2,500
- Support: From £99/month
- Average delivery: 3-4 weeks
- Uptime guarantee: 99.9%
